This package contains lit components for CometChat Web UI Kits: React, Angular, and Vue. It is designed to provide a comprehensive set of configurations, styles, and a sound manager for the comet chat UI.

## Features
1. UI Kit Configurations
2. Styles
3. Sound Manager
4. CometChat SDK dependent Core UI Lit Elements
5. Checks if Calls SDK is available with the project
6. Utility methods

## Peer Dependency
It has `@cometchat/chat-sdk-javascript` as a peer dependency.

## Note
This package is used by the CometChat Web UI Kits internally. The package is not meant to be used without other required CometChat dependencies.

## Help and Support
For issues running the project or integrating with our UI Kits, consult our [documentation](https://www.cometchat.com/docs/uikits/home) or create a [support ticket](https://help.cometchat.com/hc/en-us) or seek real-time support via the [CometChat Dashboard](https://app.cometchat.com/).
